# Third-party development inputs

The setup script downloads the official Maya 2026 Update 3 Linux DevKit here.
The archive and extracted tree are ignored because they are large Autodesk
distributions, not NanoXGen source.

- archive: `Autodesk_Maya_2026_3_Update_DEVKIT_Linux.tgz`
- SHA-256: `d23cc9e788a0114c683983363e28b08f040b900ab728bbf4707baee2dc563c37`
- official page: <https://aps.autodesk.com/developer/overview/maya-api>

For API-shape research, the ignored `xgen-spline-to-cyhair` checkout is the
MIT-licensed project at <https://github.com/syoyo/xgen-spline-to-cyhair>.

Neither dependency is copied into NanoXGen deliverables.
